title: [Prime] Amazon Fire TV Stick HD (2026 Model) $39 (RRP $79) Delivered @ Amazon AU
body:
Deal: [Prime] Amazon Fire TV Stick HD (2026 Model) $39 (RRP $79) Delivered @ Amazon AU

[jv] For enhanced security, this device prevents sideloading
[Lizard Spock] One of the more helpful jv comments. I'd rank it in the top 5.
[BestTechAdvisor] There's been a couple of good jv comments today. If it wasn't for the bold text I'd be concerned the account has been compromised.
[carrawa] No side loading, based on linux, very fast reviews said. Removed android bloatware etc slowing it down.
Can these run Netflix etc as the last time I heard about them a while ago they said it was restricted without sideloading etc. ? The review didn't cover this.
[WillRay92] @jv: ArmenianBargain doesn't have the same ring to it.
[jv] @WillRay92: In the Armenian language it does…
[L0zBargain] @WillRay92: That's because it's ArmBargain 💪
[Nayf3r105] Ofcourse they run netflix. Sideloading refers to apps not from the fire stick app store.
[carrawa] So, Netflix and other main streaming apps are available from the fire stick app store?
Years ago I bought an Android box as most said you couldn't install them or they could only be installed with problematic side loading. I haven't had good success with side loading personally so I avoided it.
[Nayf3r105] Yes all the popular apps are available and some pre installed. Average person honestly won't ever sideload anything.
[tarkine] I can no longer see any value in these devices with the new os and it restricting any third apps or sidelong
[sinners007] 100%… And before anyone says that side-loading is for pirating, that's not always the case. The Amazon app store (even on the Android Fire Sticks) still didn't have all the apps, so side-loading was important. I wouldn't touch one of these Vega Fire Sticks.
[lachhelix] I remember buying a bunch of these from JB probably 6/7 years ago - they were ridiculously slow - have they improved since then?
[sinners007] The 4K Max is a beast. They're much faster now.
[Odin] New model can't have custom launchers and is locked down hard
[Onemoredeal] Needed the crappy one for my cheap projector in bedroom, also went via shopback hopefully the 9.5% tracks
[Onemoredeal] I used them once , was Amazon by coincidence when they had the free $10 promo, they screwed me so I deleted my account . I know JV I should have done a forum post about it but elected to cop it in silence and move on.
[jv] they screwed me so I deleted my account
I got about $800 cashback from Expedia… No issues.
[Onemoredeal] @jv: Like getting a bad meal mate, you can be a Karen and try and destroy them, or just not go back. I elected not to return
[jv] @Onemoredeal:
Like getting a bad meal mate
Then don't buy from that store in Topcashback.
It's the store that determines if the cashback is valid.
[Onemoredeal] @jv: I’m not upset , just not gonna use them again , it was like a year ago
[jv] @Onemoredeal: It's like getting a bad meal in a food court and then avoiding the entire food court.
[King Steuart] @jv: Expedia is why I started to use TCB, SB failed so hard when I needed it most for a disability stay
[sparky347] Does anyone watch stuff in 1080p anymore? I know, I know - not everything available in 4K, Butt if ya can get it in 4K, I'd feel so last century, if I had to watch in 1080. It's like watching Avatar in B/W
[Onemoredeal] I’m too cheap to pay for the expensive Kayo , so only get HD, same with Netflix, and don’t notice much difference over the 4k stuff on prime and Stan .
[jv] I’m too cheap to pay for the expensive Kayo
Premium was $15/mth for some CBA customers…
[Onemoredeal] I get kayo via my football team a bit cheaper and support the club, happy with that
[jv] @Onemoredeal: How much of the money goes to the club???
You might be better off getting the $15 deal and donating to the club.
[Onemoredeal] @jv: Maybe, but I’m not banking with cba… ever
[XVX] My bedroom tv is only 1080p, so something like this would be perfect since the old Chromecast in the tv has started to just not work with most apps. Shame about the side loading aspect otherwise I would be grabbing one of these in a heartbeat.
[tman2020] Get the 4k plus for $59. No problem with sideloading and will come in handy when you upgrade the TV to 4k :)
[Frackingiscool] The non limited one is $64
I'd give this a shot if they had a way to check the availability of apps on the Amazon store for the Linux version. Amazon app store (android) has wholphin/jellyfin/Plex/Kodi and only app I have side loaded is smarttube.
Interesting to see if a workaround comes about
[Agileduck] Is this the non limited one?
https://www.amazon.com.au/dp/B0F7Z4LF41?ref=amzdv_ucc_dp_lod…
[Frackingiscool] That's a better choice being the 4k and no mention of vega os and released October 2025 so android side loading a go-go.
I meant non limited HD https://amzn.asia/d/09fNlOjj
[superforever] Wait for 4k max, may be cheap on Prime day.
[tman2020] 4k plus is $59. Much better for an extra $20. Bought one a week ago and no issues with sideloading via downloader.
[superforever] Can get 10% cash back now
https://www.ozbargain.com.au/node/965852
[SamyKn] With sideloading disabled , there is literally no point in this.
just use your phone and cast to TV…. imho of course!
[Hirolol] Hopefully they don’t discontinue others and push hard on these :(
